description: Maps durable harness installation IDs to operating roles. Harness IDs are defined by harness-state/harness-identities.json.

A.assigned_reason: Owner requested Claude Code as Prime Builder and Codex as Loyal Opposition

B.assigned_reason: Owner requested Claude Code as Prime Builder and Codex as Loyal Opposition

C.assigned_reason: Owner assigned Prime Builder to Antigravity while Claude Code is offline; obsolete Antigravity restrictions lifted
